/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmsgs-nsgs.so.1 -o libmsgs-nsgs.so.1.0.0 "CMakeFiles/msgs-nsgs.dir/msgs-nsgs_genmsg/gz/msgs/thermal.pb.cc.o" "CMakeFiles/msgs-nsgs.dir/msgs-nsgs_genmsg/gz/msgs/register.cc.o"  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgz-msgs10.so.10.3.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgz-math7.so.7.5.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgz-utils2.so.2.2.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinyxml2.so
